languages.text: "Странное чувство. Зауэрбеки, которые при мне были никем, возвысились до дворянского статуса, а род Аффинати, славный в мое время, исчез без следа..." {n}Вокс Себериана скрипит и умолкает, словно бы его аугментация на мгновение вышла из строя. Но продолжать фразу ваш предок явно не намерен.{/n}

"'Tis a strange feeling. The Sauerbacks — no one worth knowing in my day — have ascended to noble status, while House Affinati, glorious in my time, has vanished without a trace..." {n}Seberian's vox rasps and goes dead, as if his augmentation has momentarily stopped working. Whatever the reason, your ancestor clearly has no intention of continuing.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Странное чувство. Whatever the reason, your ancestor clearly has no intention of continuing.{/n}

languages.text: 「奇妙な気分だ。サウアーバック家、私の時代には知られた人物もいなかったが、貴族の身分を得た。一方、私の時代には栄光を誇ったアフィンティ家、どこへ消えてしまったのか…」{n}セベリアンの声がかすれて途絶え、相手が沈黙したのか、それとも拡張機能が一時的に停止したのか、わからない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "'Tis a strange feeling. The Sauerbacks — no one worth knowing in my day — have ascended to noble status, while House Affinati, glorious in my time, has vanished without a trace..." {n}Seberian's vox rasps and goes dead, and you are unsure whether your interlocutor has gone silent or whether his augmentation has momentarily stopped working.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「奇妙な気分だ。サウアーバック家、私の時代には知られた人物もいなかったが、貴族の身分を得た。一方、私の時代には栄光を誇ったアフィンティ家、どこへ消えてしまったのか…」{n}セベリアンの声がかすれて途絶え、相手が沈黙したのか、それとも拡張機能が一時的に停止したのか、わからない。{/n}

languages.text: “这感觉可真是奇怪。苏尔贝克家族在我的时代不过是群无名之辈，如今竟已跻身贵族之列；而在当年显赫一时的阿菲纳蒂家族，却已消失得无影无踪……”{n}塞贝里安的音阵发出刺耳杂音，随后归于沉寂，仿佛他的植入物暂时失了灵。不管原因是什么，你的先祖显然不打算继续说下去。{/n}
languages.original_text: "'Tis a strange feeling. The Sauerbacks — no one worth knowing in my day — have ascended to noble status, while House Affinati, glorious in my time, has vanished without a trace..." {n}Seberian's vox rasps and goes dead, as if his augmentation has momentarily stopped working. Whatever the reason, your ancestor clearly has no intention of continuing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这感觉可真是奇怪。苏尔贝克家族在我的时代不过是群无名之辈，如今竟已跻身贵族之列；而在当年显赫一时的阿菲纳蒂家族，却已消失得无影无踪……”{n}塞贝里安的音阵发出刺耳杂音，随后归于沉寂，仿佛他的植入物暂时失了灵。不管原因是什么，你的先祖显然不打算继续说下去。{/n}

languages.text: «Es una sensación extraña. Los Sauerback, que no eran nadie en mi época, han ascendido al estrato noble, mientras que la casa Affinati, gloriosa entonces, ha desaparecido sin dejar rastro...». {n}El voco de Seberian chirría y se queda en silencio, como si el aumento se hubiera estropeado. Sea cual sea el motivo, tu antepasado no quiere seguir hablando del tema.{/n}
languages.original_text: "'Tis a strange feeling. The Sauerbacks — no one worth knowing in my day — have ascended to noble status, while House Affinati, glorious in my time, has vanished without a trace..." {n}Seberian's vox rasps and goes dead, as if his augmentation has momentarily stopped working. Whatever the reason, your ancestor clearly has no intention of continuing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Es una sensación extraña. Los Sauerback, que no eran nadie en mi época, han ascendido al estrato noble, mientras que la casa Affinati, gloriosa entonces, ha desaparecido sin dejar rastro...». {n}El voco de Seberian chirría y se queda en silencio, como si el aumento se hubiera estropeado. Sea cual sea el motivo, tu antepasado no quiere seguir hablando del tema.{/n}

languages.text: "Das ist ein seltsames Gefühl. Die Sauerbacks — die man zu meiner Zeit nicht kennen musste — wurden in den Adelsstand erhoben, während das einst so ruhmreiche Haus Affinati spurlos verschwunden ist ..." {n}Seberians Vox knistert und verstummt, als würde seine Augmentation nicht mehr funktionieren. Aus welchem Grund auch immer hat dein Ahnherr nicht die Absicht, fortzufahren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "'Tis a strange feeling. The Sauerbacks — no one worth knowing in my day — have ascended to noble status, while House Affinati, glorious in my time, has vanished without a trace..." {n}Seberian's vox rasps and goes dead, as if his augmentation has momentarily stopped working. Whatever the reason, your ancestor clearly has no intention of continuing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Das ist ein seltsames Gefühl. Die Sauerbacks — die man zu meiner Zeit nicht kennen musste — wurden in den Adelsstand erhoben, während das einst so ruhmreiche Haus Affinati spurlos verschwunden ist ..." {n}Seberians Vox knistert und verstummt, als würde seine Augmentation nicht mehr funktionieren. Aus welchem Grund auch immer hat dein Ahnherr nicht die Absicht, fortzufahren.{/n}

languages.text: « C'est étrange. Les Sauerback, une famille qui ne valait pas la peine d'être connue à mon époque, a acquis ses lettres de noblesse, tandis que la glorieuse maison Affinati a disparu sans laisser de trace... » {n}Le vox de Seberian émet un grincement puis se coupe, comme si son augmentation avait cessé de fonctionner. Quelle que soit la raison de cette interruption, votre ancêtre n'a visiblement pas l'intention de continuer.{/n}
languages.original_text: "'Tis a strange feeling. The Sauerbacks — no one worth knowing in my day — have ascended to noble status, while House Affinati, glorious in my time, has vanished without a trace..." {n}Seberian's vox rasps and goes dead, as if his augmentation has momentarily stopped working. Whatever the reason, your ancestor clearly has no intention of continuing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est étrange. Les Sauerback, une famille qui ne valait pas la peine d'être connue à mon époque, a acquis ses lettres de noblesse, tandis que la glorieuse maison Affinati a disparu sans laisser de trace... » {n}Le vox de Seberian émet un grincement puis se coupe, comme si son augmentation avait cessé de fonctionner. Quelle que soit la raison de cette interruption, votre ancêtre n'a visiblement pas l'intention de continuer.{/n}

languages.text: "Garip geliyor. Sauerbackler soylu statüsüne yükselmiş. Benim zamanımda tanınmaya değer kimseler değildi. Şanlı Affinati Hanesi ise iz bırakmadan yok olmuş..." {n}Seberian'ın voksu, sanki ogmentasyonu anlık olarak çalışmayı durdurmuş gibi hırıldayıp susuyor. Sebebi ne olursa olsun, atanın konuşmaya sürdürmeye niyeti yok.{/n}

Whatever the reason, your ancestor clearly has no intention of continuing.{/n}
